description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a security_release:update_paths stage and a security_release:update_paths:start stage. Add a security_release_update_paths job that runs in the security_release:update_paths stage, needs the create_dynamic_pipeline job, and triggers a downstream pipeline by forwarding all pipeline variables, including the generated dynamic-gitlab-ci.yml artifact from the create_dynamic_pipeline job and the local .gitlab/ci/include/secrets-self-contained.yml file, using strategy depend; it runs only when $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE is pipeline, web or api and $SECURITY_RELEASE_PIPELINE is update_paths or true. Add a security_release_update_paths:create_dynamic_pipeline job that extends .with-bundle and .common-ci-tokens, needs the security_release_update_paths:start job, runs in the security_release:update_paths stage, and executes the script: set -eo pipefail; bundle exec rake 'security:update_paths:generate_dynamic_pipeline' to write dynamic-gitlab-ci.yml; echo a collapsed section header with the current timestamp; cat dynamic-gitlab-ci.yml; echo a section footer, storing dynamic-gitlab-ci.yml as an artifact. Add a security_release_update_paths:start job that also extends .with-bundle and .common-ci-tokens, needs the optional job security_release_tag:check_omnibus_packages_tagging, runs in the security_release:update_paths:start stage, and runs the script: bundle exec rake 'security:update_paths:start'; it is manual when $SECURITY_RELEASE_PIPELINE equals update_paths and runs automatically on success when it equals true.
